event: Rural landscape with village and distant hills
description: A panoramic landscape viewed from an elevated vantage point looking down over a small village nestled among trees and fields. A winding dirt path descends from the left foreground, where two small dark figures walk together. The middle distance is filled with clustered rooftops, gardens, and scattered trees in autumnal tones of ochre, rust, and muted green. Beyond the village, open fields stretch toward distant blue-gray hills under a broad, overcast sky streaked with pale light near the horizon. The brushwork is loose and atmospheric, capturing the quality of diffused light on a cloudy day.

_meta.title: Church at Moret. After the Rain
